description_long: This vending machine is a rectangular, upright unit with a dark, metallic exterior. The front features a large, transparent display window revealing an array of colorful products arranged in rows, likely snacks and beverages. To the right of the window is a vertical control panel with a keypad and what appears to be a payment interface. Below the display window is a wide, recessed slot for product retrieval. The sides and back of the machine are solid, unadorned, and finished in a matte dark color, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The overall design is typical of vending machines found in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and building lobbies.
description: A dark, rectangular vending machine with a transparent front window displaying products, a keypad and payment panel on the right, and a wide retrieval slot below.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent product window, keypad, payment interface, and retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Side view showing a plain, solid dark panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, also a plain, solid dark panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Rear view, featuring a solid, unadorned dark panel.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right side of the front face, vertically oriented, with a keypad and possibly a small screen or indicator lights.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is integrated into the right side of the front panel, featuring a slot and keypad, likely for coins, bills, or cards.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical keypad with multiple buttons is present on the right side of the front panel, arranged in a grid for product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot is located at the bottom center of the front face, recessed into the machine.
